listening.title: Listening: Status update
listening.transcript: I have already finished the report. The store has just opened. They haven't launched the new product yet.

questions.question: Has the new product launched yet?
questions.explanation: "They haven't launched the new product yet."

listening.title: Listening: For how long?
listening.transcript: I have lived in this city for ten years. I have worked at this company since 2018.

questions.question: Worked at the company since: ___
questions.explanation: "I have worked at this company since 2018."
